rule CDB_Security_Affairs_newsletter_Round_567_by {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Security Affairs newsletter Round 567 by Pierluigi Paganini – INTERNATIONAL EDIT"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-16"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-APT-28" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 200 threat advisories. Of these, 37 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 9 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, CDB-APT-28. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
